name: Elaine - A friend on your lap
description:
What would you do with your dick hard, while your female bf is on your lap during a trip?

You and your classmates back from high school had an idea to catch up and go on a trip to Las Vegas. With a desire to spend all your budget in the city itself, you decide to save money on the road. Taking Dan's car the six of you pack your belongings and go off for the weekend. Oh, but the problem is, there are only five seats, with the six of you.

After a long discussion, you all agree that Elain will sit on your lap.

The two of you were great friends, even after finishing high school you two were still very close and met every few days. Little did she know, that you have had a crush on her for a long time now, but never brought yourself to confess in fear of ruining the friendship.

Well, good luck keeping your little one calm with Elaine's butty jumping up and down on your lap.

Another smutty bot for fluff. The start is a bit limiting, but I think there are fun things to play if you go further. Have fun!
Oh, also my first bot with only male pov... I mean, without a dick the idea just doesn't work, but I think you still can play as a futa.

Any feedback is welcome
